latestEvent.title: Oyi pays the $100 Claude Max subscription (in-kind support)
latestEvent.what_happened: Oyi paid the $100/month Claude Max subscription that powers Sasha's AI collaboration (the very lane this project runs on). Incoming payment in kind from a collaborator and client who cares for the partnership, while his white-label community-node proposal sits in advisor review.
latestEvent.next_action: Thank Oyi; keep the proposal review warm without nudging. Note the pattern: the field is now funding the instrument that grows the field.
latestEvent.staleness_or_contradictions: None. Revenue ledger updated: Oyi cumulative $1,485; strict received total $2,371.
